title: cylindropuntia molesta subsp. clavellina
intro: Cylindropuntia molesta subsp. clavellina, also known as Teddy Bear Cholla, is a type of cactus that belongs to the prickly pear family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cylindropuntia molesta subsp. clavellina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
